feat\(claude\): consolidate config, add QQQ MCP, fix onboarding

- Move CLAUDE.md management from ai module to claude module
- Add QQQ MCP server \(http://localhost:8080/mcp\)
- Add theme preference to settings.json
- Fix jq --argfile to --slurpfile for newer jq versions
- Add defensive checks to prevent data loss on jq failure
- Set hasCompletedOnboarding to prevent setup wizard
EOF
\)")

feat\(scripts\): add git batch operation scripts

- gclo: clone all repos from GitHub org \(SSH default\)
- gfa/gpa: fetch/pull all repos
- gba/gcoa: show/checkout branches across repos
- gla: show recent commits for all repos
- gi: comprehensive repo info with GitHub/CircleCI links
- ghelp: show all custom git commands
EOF
\)")

Bash(ssh 100.76.144.59 -p 22 "brew leaves 2>/dev/null; echo '===CASKS==='; brew list --cask 2>/dev/null; echo '===PIPX==='; pipx list --short 2>/dev/null; echo '===NODE==='; node --version 2>/dev/null; echo '===HOSTNAME==='; hostname; echo '===UNAME==='; uname -m")
Bash(date +%s echo "---" git status --short echo "---" git log --oneline @{u}..)
Bash(xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "=== {} ==="; grep -E "verbose title|error|verbose exit" {} | head -10')
Bash(timeout 8 ssh -v -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o PreferredAuthentications=none -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null grogu true)
Bash(timeout 8 ssh -v -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o PreferredAuthentications=none -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null grogu.tailcd15f.ts.net true)
Bash(timeout 8 ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no grogu 'echo connected as $\(whoami\)@$\(hostname\); uname -s')

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{p['HostName']}: advertised={p.get\('PrimaryRoutes', []\)} allowed={p.get\('AllowedIPs', []\)}\\"\) for p in [data['Self']]+list\(data.get\('Peer',{}\).values\(\)\) if p['HostName'] in \('grogu','dark-horse'\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Self.AdvertisedRoutes:', d['Self'].get\('AdvertisedRoutes'\)\); [print\(f\\"  peer {p['HostName']}: AllowedIPs={p.get\('AllowedIPs'\)}\\"\) for p in d.get\('Peer',{}\).values\(\) if p['HostName']=='grogu']")

Bash(timeout 6 ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=4 grogu 'echo "[on $\(hostname\)] internal DNS reachable test: $\(dig +short +timeout=2 +tries=1 www.youtube.com @10.100.10.1 | head -1\)"')
